raw_results_policy: Raw benchmark JSON, log, and PDF outputs are intentionally untracked. Re-run the retained Phase 1a benchmark scripts to regenerate local raw outputs.
final_decisions: Column/row COTS split is mathematically exact and remains covered by unit tests.
WQKV uses KV-biased column assignment so K/V head groups land on the CPU slice first.
The Phase 1a Python runner is retained only as the eager kill-switch path after Phase 1c.
Dry-run decomposition remains a diagnostic for separating host orchestration from active CPU work.
important_experiments_preserved_in_docs: thread-count sweeps for CPU matmul behavior
Nsight overlap probe validating concurrent CPU/GPU work
